description: Action request schema and validation rules for agent operations

example.reason: Fix HP bounds check allowing negative values

validation_rules.description: Before modifying domain/ files, verify no invariants from spec/invariants.md are violated
Verify imports respect layer boundaries: core/ and game/ never import each other
No production dependencies may be added to package.json
After modifying ecosystem/data/*.json, run npm run sync-data to regenerate JS modules
After modifying game/ or domain/ files, run npm run budget to verify size compliance
After modifying monster stats or moves, run simulation to verify game balance
